events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the sub-30° sling angle drives leg tension well beyond rated capacity (angle factor ≥2.0x at exactly 30°, worse below it), which is a fail/high-risk, non-compliant rigging configuration per ASME B30.9 and OSHA 1926.251(a)(1). Recommended action is to stop the lift and re-rig for a shallower load angle (45°+) before proceeding.
